View of NPU TIM of 10 cores

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x5a000000
Size:
0x918000
Source:
scpu.rdl

Description

NPU firmware is loaded into these memories before starting the cores. A bit-mask in the NIM file format determines which ELFs are loaded into which core.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x000000 npu_itim_core0 View of core-local address 0x0180_0000 (32 KiB)
0x008000 - -
0x010000 npu_dtim_core0 View of core-local address 0x3000_0000 (32 KiB)
0x018000 - -
